title: King and Queen Fall Back
description: On pages 0–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Sanji, King as The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.
scene: The raid nears its climax as Zoro and Sanji settle their commander fights while Law and Kid confront Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How is it that Kimonos make all women look so elegant?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: To solve this mystery ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...I will reside in Wano forever!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Whoa! No losing it in Dream- Land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AAAH... yet again today...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hold it, sangoro. Now's hardly the time to wax poetic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's about time you made a decision already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ... the flower capital blows with beauty.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of restaurant are you gonna open?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ~Story thus far~

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looking for powerful Samuel to bolster their ranks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Sanji-now called Sangoro-decides to use his cooking to attract as many people, and potential candidates, as possible!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Got any good ideas?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I've got a handful, usohachi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Which one, though?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's hard to choose, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...sushi it is.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, no. Eel is too hard to pass up.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: *FLAGS: SUSHI

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget we can't let on that we're here illegally.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: best to pick something that'll help us blend in.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: something that won't have too much local competition either.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Excuse me?! Are you implying my dishes could possibly lose out to some town cook's?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HN? Ooh! Something smells good.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ah! Soba noodles!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They smell heavenly!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A generous compliment, good sir! Very generous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: #Signs: SOBA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Would you like to try them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Heck yeah! One piping hot bowl, please!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: order up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mmmmm!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
